title: Review export apply-check after pinmux cleanup
question: Does the cleaned four-patch review snapshot apply cleanly to a local candidate ancestry base?
procedure: Created a temporary worktree from local candidate ancestry at 9c2f8ef004d6^.
Ran git am over exported review patches 0001 through 0004.
Checked A733 review patches for stale allwinner,pinmux after H118.
result: Patch 0002 failed because Documentation/devicetree/bindings/arm/sunxi.yaml already contains the Radxa Cubie A7S entry in that local ancestry.
H118 pinmux cleanup remains verified: no allwinner,pinmux appears in the A733 source DTS files or exported A733 review patches.
decision: The review snapshot is not send-ready. Do not hand-edit more flat patches for submission; regenerate the review series from a clean branch with the fixup folded.
next_action: Create a fresh review branch from the intended base, fold b1f20d455a60 into the DTS commits, regenerate patches with b4/format-patch, then rerun the validation floor.
